name: Bill's Favorite Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried mushrooms in hot water for 20 minutes.
2. In a separate pot, sauté garlic and onions in butter until soft.
3. Finely chop the dried mushrooms using a food processor (optional).
4. Save some mushroom soaking water.
5. Add the chopped mushrooms to the onion, garlic mixture.
6. Cook for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in flour until incorporated.
8. Gradually add about ¼ cup of the mushroom soaking water into the vegetable mixture, stirring constantly.
9. Carefully pour the remaining mushroom soaking water back into the pot, leaving a lid on.
10. Discard any leftover soaking water (it may contain sand particles).
11. Add pepper and Hega Beef Base to taste.
12. Cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes.
13. Stir in the heavy cream and cook until warm.
